title: Yiv's API
description: Shared API for Yiv’s mods: client events, conditional mixin plugin, and small compat helpers.
body: # Yiv’s API ![Available for Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20for-1.21.x-a69374?style=for-the-badge) ![Fabric Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-a69374?style=for-the-badge) ![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Fabric%20API-a69374?style=for-the-badge) ![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21%2B-a69374?style=for-the-badge) ![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-a69374?style=for-the-badge) Yiv’s API is a lightweight shared library used by Yiv’s Fabric mods. It centralizes common hooks and compatibility logic so Yiv’s mods work smoothly together and with other mods. On its own, this mod doesn’t add gameplay content. --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## What it Does - Provides stable, shared hooks that Yiv’s mods use for client-side features like overlays and per-tick updates. - Adds smart compatibility logic to reduce conflicts between mixins from different mods. - Stays invisible to players: no menus, no keybinds, no gameplay changes. --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## Who Should Install This - Players using any Yiv’s mods that list **Yiv’s API** as a required dependency. - Modpack creators who include Yiv’s mods and want a clean, conflict-free experience. - Developers working with Yiv’s mods (the API makes shared behavior consistent across projects). --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## Compatibility - **Minecraft:** 1.21.x (Fabric) - **Requires:** Fabric Loader ≥ 0.17.x and Fabric API ≥ 0.102.0+1.21.1 - **Java:** 21 or newer > This is primarily a client-side library. It doesn’t add content and has negligible performance impact. --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## Installation Install it like any other Fabric mod. If a Yiv mod requires this API, place **Yiv’s API** in your `mods` folder alongside that mod. Make sure you’re using the correct versions for your Minecraft and Fabric setup. --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## Notes for Developers This page is for players and modpack users. Full developer documentation, examples, and source code will be available in the future. --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## Links - 💬 Support & issues: [Discord](https://discord.gg/r4nAbgaZs7) --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## License MIT License (see LICENSE) --- ![API bar](https://i.imgur.com/jUCSBMh.png) ## More Yiv Mods
